# AgentKit — Pre-built AI Agent Workflows
> Download battle-tested AI agent templates with system prompts, MCP configs, n8n workflows, and setup guides. Deploy an agent in under 30 minutes.

## Docs
- https://agentkit-sandy.vercel.app
- https://agentkit-sandy.vercel.app/templates

## API
- https://agentkit-sandy.vercel.app/api/subscribe
